meta.label: FreestyleFly 结构化词库 · 海报

entries.title: Conceptual Typography Poster
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Premium title-led posters with strong typographic systems.

Make typography the hero and spell the title exactly.
Tie human figures, objects, or landscapes to the title meaning.
Avoid default word art, unrelated icons, and misspelled title text.
Limit the color system to a restrained palette.
entries.description: Premium title-led posters with strong typographic systems.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成以标题文字为主视觉的高级字体海报。
entries.promptZh:
生成以标题文字为主视觉的高级字体海报。

让字体成为画面主角,并保证标题拼写准确。
人物、物体或风景需要服务标题含义。
避免默认字效、无关图标和标题错字。
控制配色数量,保持克制。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的海报条目《概念字体海报》。 关键词：Poster、Typography、Creative、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: conceptual typography poster premium title-led posters with strong typographic systems. premium title-led posters with strong typographic systems. make typography the hero and spell the title exactly. tie human figures, objects, or landscapes to the title meaning. avoid default word art, unrelated icons, and misspelled title text. limit the color system to a restrained palette. posters & typography poster typography style creative social

entries.title: Ink Double Exposure Poster
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Chinese ink, portrait, and layered atmosphere composition.

Blend portrait silhouette, ink texture, atmosphere, and negative space.
Keep composition quiet, premium, and readable.
Avoid cheap fantasy collage and overloaded scenery.
Use subtle text or no text unless required.
entries.description: Chinese ink, portrait, and layered atmosphere composition.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成水墨、人像与层叠氛围结合的视觉海报。
entries.promptZh:
生成水墨、人像与层叠氛围结合的视觉海报。

融合人像剪影、水墨质感、氛围和留白。
保持构图克制、高级、可读。
避免廉价奇幻拼贴和景物堆叠。
非必要时减少文字。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的海报条目《水墨双重曝光海报》。 关键词：Poster、Illustration、Story、History。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Poster Layout System
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Event, product, movie, and social poster compositions.

Lock subject, headline, layout, palette, and aspect ratio.
Make the title hierarchy and primary visual clear.
Avoid mixed moodboards or process sheets when asking for one finished poster.
Constrain extra text and decorative symbols.
entries.description: Event, product, movie, and social poster compositions.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成活动、产品、电影和社媒传播海报。
entries.promptZh:
生成活动、产品、电影和社媒传播海报。

锁定主体、标题、版式、配色和比例。
突出标题层级和主视觉。
需要成品海报时,避免生成拼贴展示板。
约束多余文字和装饰符号。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的海报条目《海报排版系统》。 关键词：Poster、Typography、Commerce、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: poster layout system event, product, movie, and social poster compositions. event, product, movie, and social poster compositions. lock subject, headline, layout, palette, and aspect ratio. make the title hierarchy and primary visual clear. avoid mixed moodboards or process sheets when asking for one finished poster. constrain extra text and decorative symbols. posters & typography poster typography campaign commerce social

entries.title: Sports Campaign Poster
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Commercial sports visuals with athletes, props, and brand color.

Define sport, athlete pose, hero prop, title, and brand palette.
Use dramatic light, clean composition, and readable data overlays.
Avoid wrong equipment and noisy collage.
Keep the athlete and hero prop visually dominant.
entries.description: Commercial sports visuals with athletes, props, and brand color.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成运动员、道具、品牌色统一的商业运动海报。
entries.promptZh:
生成运动员、道具、品牌色统一的商业运动海报。

定义运动项目、姿态、核心道具、标题和品牌色。
使用强光影、干净构图和可读数据层。
避免错误运动器材和杂乱拼贴。
让运动员和核心道具占据主导。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的海报条目《运动商业 Campaign》。 关键词：Poster、Realistic、Commerce、Fashion。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Nature Science Poster
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Minimal product-style science posters for natural subjects.

Use a clear subject, minimal copy, soft shadows, and disciplined whitespace.
Keep the scientific label short and visible.
Avoid heavy advertising language.
Avoid dense encyclopedia blocks.
entries.description: Minimal product-style science posters for natural subjects.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成极简产品感自然科普海报。
entries.promptZh:
生成极简产品感自然科普海报。

使用清晰主体、少量文案、柔和阴影和充足留白。
让科普标签短而清楚。
避免广告感太重。
避免密集百科正文。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的海报条目《自然科普海报》。 关键词：Poster、Infographic、Education。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
